revision.text:
'''庚子'''（かのえね、こうし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて37番目で、前は[[己亥]]、次は[[辛丑]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は金、[[十二支]]の五行は水で、[[五行思想#相生|相生]]（金生水）である。
==庚子の年==
==庚子の日== ===[[選日]]=== 庚子の日は[[天一天上]]の8日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{Otheruses|干支|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)}}
{{干支}} '''庚子'''（かのえね、こうきんのねずみ、こうきんのね、こうし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの37番目で、前は[[己亥]]、次は[[辛丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==庚子の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って40が余る年が庚子の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚子の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[40年]] *[[100年]] *[[160年]] *[[220年]] *[[280年]] *[[340年]] *[[400年]] *[[460年]] *[[520年]] *[[580年]] *[[640年]] *[[700年]] *[[760年]] *[[820年]] *[[880年]] *[[940年]] *[[1000年]] | *[[1060年]] *[[1120年]] *[[1180年]] *[[1240年]] *[[1300年]] *[[1360年]] *[[1420年]] *[[1480年]] *[[1540年]] *[[1600年]] *[[1660年]] *[[1720年]] *[[1780年]] *[[1840年]] *[[1900年]] *[[1960年]] | *[[2020年]] *[[2080年]] *[[2140年]] *[[2200年]] *[[2260年]] *[[2320年]] *[[2380年]] *[[2440年]] *[[2500年]] *[[2560年]] *[[2620年]] *[[2680年]] *[[2740年]] *[[2800年]] *[[2860年]] *[[2920年]] *[[2980年]] |}
==庚子の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[11月]]が庚子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚子の日== ===選日=== 庚子の日は[[天一天上]]の8日目である。
==関連項目== *[[庚子 (西涼)]] - [[中国]]・[[五胡十六国時代]]の王朝[[西涼]]の[[年号]]。400年 - 404年。 *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:庚子]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:庚子]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:庚子]]

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの37番目で、前は[[己亥]]、次は[[辛丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==庚子の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って40が余る年が庚子の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚子の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[40年]] *[[100年]] *[[160年]] *[[220年]] *[[280年]] *[[340年]] *[[400年]] *[[460年]] *[[520年]] *[[580年]] *[[640年]] *[[700年]] *[[760年]] *[[820年]] *[[880年]] *[[940年]] *[[1000年]] | *[[1060年]] *[[1120年]] *[[1180年]] *[[1240年]] *[[1300年]] *[[1360年]] *[[1420年]] *[[1480年]] *[[1540年]] *[[1600年]] *[[1660年]] *[[1720年]] *[[1780年]] *[[1840年]] *[[1900年]] *[[1960年]] | *[[2020年]] *[[2080年]] *[[2140年]] *[[2200年]] *[[2260年]] *[[2320年]] *[[2380年]] *[[2440年]] *[[2500年]] *[[2560年]] *[[2620年]] *[[2680年]] *[[2740年]] *[[2800年]] *[[2860年]] *[[2920年]] *[[2980年]] |}
==庚子の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[11月]]が庚子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚子の日== ===選日=== 庚子の日は[[天一天上]]の8日目である。

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Rat|kanji=庚子|romaji=kanoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=gēngzǐ|w=keng-tzŭ|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ tsɨ|y=geng1 zi2|j=geng1 zi2|ci=kɪŋ tsi|mc=kæŋ tsi|oc-bs=kˤraŋ tsi}} {{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)}}
{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''Yang Metal Rat also known as <!--please transliterate all the hiragana readings into romaji and provide the kanji--> 庚子'''（かのえね、こうきんのねずみ、こうきんのね、こうし）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの37番目で、前は[[己亥]]、次は[[辛丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。
==庚子の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って40が余る年が庚子の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚子の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[40年]] *[[100年]] *[[160年]] *[[220年]] *[[280年]] *[[340年]] *[[400年]] *[[460年]] *[[520年]] *[[580年]] *[[640年]] *[[700年]] *[[760年]] *[[820年]] *[[880年]] *[[940年]] *[[1000年]] | *[[1060年]] *[[1120年]] *[[1180年]] *[[1240年]] *[[1300年]] *[[1360年]] *[[1420年]] *[[1480年]] *[[1540年]] *[[1600年]] *[[1660年]] *[[1720年]] *[[1780年]] *[[1840年]] *[[1900年]] *[[1960年]] | *[[2020年]] *[[2080年]] *[[2140年]] *[[2200年]] *[[2260年]] *[[2320年]] *[[2380年]] *[[2440年]] *[[2500年]] *[[2560年]] *[[2620年]] *[[2680年]] *[[2740年]] *[[2800年]] *[[2860年]] *[[2920年]] *[[2980年]] |}
==庚子の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[11月]]が庚子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚子の日== ===選日=== 庚子の日は[[天一天上]]の8日目である。

Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの37番目で、前は[[己亥]]、次は[[辛丑]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[庚]]は陽の[[金]]、[[十二支]]の[[子 (十二支)|子]]は陽の[[水]]で、[[五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|相生]]（金生水）である。[[Category:Untranslated Lunar Calendar Days]]
==庚子の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って40が余る年が庚子の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''庚子の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[40年]] *[[100年]] *[[160年]] *[[220年]] *[[280年]] *[[340年]] *[[400年]] *[[460年]] *[[520年]] *[[580年]] *[[640年]] *[[700年]] *[[760年]] *[[820年]] *[[880年]] *[[940年]] *[[1000年]] | *[[1060年]] *[[1120年]] *[[1180年]] *[[1240年]] *[[1300年]] *[[1360年]] *[[1420年]] *[[1480年]] *[[1540年]] *[[1600年]] *[[1660年]] *[[1720年]] *[[1780年]] *[[1840年]] *[[1900年]] *[[1960年]] | *[[2020年]] *[[2080年]] *[[2140年]] *[[2200年]] *[[2260年]] *[[2320年]] *[[2380年]] *[[2440年]] *[[2500年]] *[[2560年]] *[[2620年]] *[[2680年]] *[[2740年]] *[[2800年]] *[[2860年]] *[[2920年]] *[[2980年]] |}
==庚子の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[11月]]が庚子の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[大雪]]から[[小寒]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==庚子の日== ===選日=== 庚子の日は[[天一天上]]の8日目である。
==See Also== *[[庚子 (西涼)]] - [[中国]]・[[五胡十六国時代]]の王朝[[西涼]]の[[年号]]。400年 - 404年。 *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] '''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol '''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five '''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu '''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal gaang1 zi2 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-ne ***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-ne ***Onyomi 1: koushi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongja (경자) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tý

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang '''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|Metal Rat (Xiliang)|ja|庚子 (西涼)|lt=Metal Rat (Xiliang)|lt_ja=庚子 (西涼)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|1=Gengzi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5371236}} – The era name of the dynasty of {{ill|China|ja|中国|1=China|2=ja|3=中国|lt=China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29520}}, during the [[:en:Sixteen Kingdoms|Five Hu Sixteen Kingdoms period]], of the kingdom [[:en:Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|Xiliang]], covering 400–404 AD. *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|Metal Rat (Xiliang)|ja|庚子 (西涼)|lt=Metal Rat (Xiliang)|lt_ja=庚子 (西涼)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|1=Gengzi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5371236}} – The era name of the dynasty of {{ill|China|ja|中国|1=China|2=ja|3=中国|lt=China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29520}}, during the [[:en:Sixteen Kingdoms|Five Hu Sixteen Kingdoms period]], of the kingdom [[:en:Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|Xiliang]], covering 400–404 AD. *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Earthly Branches]] symbol ==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|Metal Rat (Xiliang)|ja|庚子 (西涼)|lt=Metal Rat (Xiliang)|lt_ja=庚子 (西涼)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|1=Gengzi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5371236}} – The era name of the dynasty of {{ill|China|ja|中国|1=China|2=ja|3=中国|lt=China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29520}}, during the [[:en:Sixteen Kingdoms|Five Hu Sixteen Kingdoms period]], of the kingdom [[:en:Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|Xiliang]], covering 400–404 AD. *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
