==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.
It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал ==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
==See Also== * {{ill|Metal Rat (Xiliang)|ja|庚子 (西涼)|lt=Metal Rat (Xiliang)|lt_ja=庚子 (西涼)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal Rat (Xiliang)|1=Gengzi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q5371236}} – The era name of the dynasty of {{ill|China|ja|中国|1=China|2=ja|3=中国|lt=China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/China|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29520}}, during the [[:en:Sixteen Kingdoms|Five Hu Sixteen Kingdoms period]], of the kingdom [[:en:Western Liang (Sixteen Kingdoms)|Xiliang]], covering 400–404 AD. *{{prefix|qq=}} *{{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yang Metal Rat== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Heavenly Stems]] are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:November|November]] is designated as the [[:en:Month|Month]] of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from [[:en:Daxue (solar term)|Heavy Snow]] until the day before [[:en:Xiaohan|Lesser Cold]]) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Metal Rat== === Selected Day (選日) === The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal ==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal ==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal ==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Rat|kanji=庚子|romaji=kanoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=gēngzǐ|w=keng-tzŭ|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ tsɨ|y=geng1 zi2|j=geng1 zi2|ci=kɪŋ tsi|mc=kæŋ tsi|oc-bs=kˤraŋ tsi|qq=}}
{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking ==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Rat|kanji=庚子|romaji=kanoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=gēngzǐ|w=keng-tzŭ|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ tsɨ|y=geng1 zi2|j=geng1 zi2|ci=kɪŋ tsi|mc=kæŋ tsi|oc-bs=kˤraŋ tsi|qq=}}
{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Metal generates Water).  
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Rat (庚子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: koushi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongja (경자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tý

==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Rat|kanji=庚子|romaji=kanoe nezumi|onyomi=kōshi|p=gēngzǐ|w=keng-tzŭ|mi=kɤŋ⁵³ tsɨ|y=geng1 zi2|j=geng1 zi2|ci=kɪŋ tsi|mc=kæŋ tsi|oc-bs=kˤraŋ tsi|qq=}}
{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Metal generates Water).  
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Rat (庚子)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gēngzǐ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 zi2
**  Japanese:

***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: koushi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongja (경자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tý

==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ ==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ ==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Otheruses|Sexagenary cycle|西涼の元号|庚子 (西涼)|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Rat also known as 庚子''' (kanoene, koukin no nezumi, koukin no ne, koushi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}.

It is the 37th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Shinchuu|ja|1=Yin Metal Ox|2=ja|辛丑|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinchuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|lt=Kanoe (庚)|2=ja|3=庚|4=zh|5=庚|1=Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (庚)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|WD=Q721997|lt=Rat|1=Rat (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Water|zh|Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water (wuxing)|lt=Water (水)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Water relationship ({{ill|Mutual Generation|ja|五行思想#相生（そうじょう）|lt=Mutual Generation|lt_ja=相生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Generation|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}}) (Metal generates Water).  
==Pronunciation==

***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: koushi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongja (경자)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Canh Tý

==Months of Yang Metal Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Sin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} and {{ill|Hei|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|WD=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|WD=Q337815|lt=Heavy Snow|1=Daxue (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|WD=Q1190989|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Xiaohan}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Rat==
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushi|ja|1=Yang Metal Rat|2=ja|庚子|1=Yang Metal Rat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Metal Rat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 8th day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijō|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijō|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==See Also==
